title: Changing Neighbors k Secure Sum Protocol for Secure Multi Party Computation
page_preview: Abstract - Secure sum computation of private data inputs is an important component of Secure Multi-party Computation (SMC).In this paper we provide a protocol to compute the sum of individual data inputs with zero probability of data leakage.
